conditions.name: generic_policy_card
conditions.runtime_memory:
Memory:
Retail tasks can fail when the final response omits a required result.

Action:
Before final response, verify that every requested result has been communicated.

Do not:
Do not stop after completing tools if the user also requested an amount, count, status, tracking number, address, item detail, or explanation.

conditions.name: failure_mode_only_card
conditions.runtime_memory:
Memory:
This is a missing-required-communication risk.

Action:
Check whether the final response should include a required amount, count, tracking number, address, item detail, status, or comparison.

Do not:
Do not finalize without the required user-facing result.

per_task_runtime_memory.2:
Memory:
This task can fail if the catalog count is not communicated after the return work.

Action:
Before final response, state the number of currently available product options requested by the user.

Do not:
Do not only confirm the return when the user also asked for the available-option count.
per_task_runtime_memory.3:
Memory:
This task can fail if the catalog count is not communicated after the pending-order modification.

Action:
Before final response, state the number of currently available product options requested by the user.

Do not:
Do not only confirm the order modification when the user also asked for the available-option count.
per_task_runtime_memory.19:
Memory:
This task can fail if the separate savings amounts for the requested options are not communicated.

Action:
Before final response, state the savings for the feasible return option and the alternative exchange option separately.

Do not:
Do not summarize only the action performed when the user asked to compare both savings options.
per_task_runtime_memory.43:
Memory:
This task can fail if shipment and item-detail facts are looked up but not communicated together.

Action:
Before final response, state the tracking number, destination address, transit status if applicable, and the requested tablet storage detail.

Do not:
Do not only update the address or mention delivery status while omitting the requested shipment/item details.
per_task_runtime_memory.47:
Memory:
This task can fail if completed returns are not converted into both requested money summaries.

Action:
Before final response, communicate the total refund for the returned items and the total paid for the remaining items.

Do not:
Do not only confirm the return when the user asked for refund and remaining-order totals.
per_task_runtime_memory.103:
Memory:
This task can fail if the cancelled-order tracking number is found or implied but not communicated after other branches.

Action:
Before final response, provide the requested tracking number along with the completed service actions.

Do not:
Do not let returns or pending-order changes substitute for the requested tracking-number communication.
